title: citrus × sinensis subsp. crassa
intro: Citrus × sinensis subsp. crassa, also known as a specific variety of the blood orange plant, is a type of citrus fruit that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and vitamin C, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus × sinensis subsp. crassa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The fruit can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as dried peel, juice, and extracts, which are used in teas, capsules, and other supplements to harness its health benefits.
